title: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for year 1998-99
description: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for year 1998-99
text: REGD. NO. D. L..-33004/98 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 484| NEW DELHI, MONDAY, DECEMBER 14, 1998/AGRAHAYANA 23, 1920 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th December, 1998 G.S.R. 738(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section 8 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange & Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) and in supersession of the notifications of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Finance (Depart- ment of Revenue) G.S.R. 679 (E), dated the 5th October, 1995 and G.S.R. No. 204 (E), dated 8th May, 1996, the Cen- tral Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Board con- sisting of: Chairman: 1. Hon'ble Mr. Justice Arun Kumar, Judge of Delhi High Court. Members: 2. Hon'ble Mr. Justice D.K. Jain, Judge of Delhi High Court. 3.. Hon'ble Mr. Justice Vijender Jain, Judge of Delhi High Court. [F. No. 674/1/98-Cus. VIII] M.S. NEG1, Under Secy. 3373 G1/98 Printed by the Manager. Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 - 1998. -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
